name: @wireio/protoc-gen-solana
description: protoc plugin generating Rust encode/decode modules from protobuf3 definitions for Solana programs

scripts.build: pnpm run compile && pnpm run bundle
scripts.dist: pnpm build && pkg -c package.json --output dist/bin/protoc-gen-solana -d dist/bundle/protoc-gen-solana.cjs
scripts.generate:test: npm run dist && mkdir -p ./dist/tests/generated && npx protoc --plugin=protoc-gen-solana=$PWD/dist/bin/protoc-gen-solana --solana_out=./dist/tests/generated tests/protos/*.proto
